3002170.name: Kingdoms of Lost Valleys
3002170.description:
Kingdoms of Lost Valleys (KoLV) is a series that brings together historical places, events, traditions, and magical creatures in a unique way. The KoLV series games tell the story of different kingdoms disputing the valley region that lies among them. In this dispute kings and generals must fight in battles/ arenas/ challenges, manage their resources, and train their armies. The Series will have TCG, RPG, and FMS games with interplay-ability.

The game is available online on the browser and mobile app and will serve a broad audience of all ages. It will be available both as P2E and F2P combining both web2 and web3 players.

Every artwork is painstakingly hand-drawn with aesthetics and design in mind.
3002170.supported_languages:
英语*, 印度尼西亚语*, 越南语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
